title: MakeShift
description: a create mod themed SMP working towards automating everything with create
body:
![MSlogo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6c45611928d8a36dfadbfac7ec1474642a5444d9.png)


# About the SMP:
**MakeShift SMP** is a **Create Mod–themed Minecraft SMP** where the ultimate goal is to automate everything using the power of Create. From intricate conveyor belts and steam-powered contraptions to fully automated farms and factories, every build pushes the limits of creativity and engineering. Whether it’s designing efficient systems, building beautiful moving machines, or collaborating on massive automation projects, MakeShift SMP is all about turning imagination into motion.


![Afterlife](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8ccd8945f32a22608e50cbe535f8a208188ddb5c.jpeg)
